generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator modeling lighting control systems within BIM for adaptive occupancy-based lighting adjustments via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)"
]

instance AdaptiveLightingController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Controller implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting policies (BOREALIS project) for energy efficiency and visual comfort optimization"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Actuator managing energy-efficient lighting schedules derived from post-occupancy sensor data and iterative policy refinement"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Modular actuator for custom predictive maintenance services integrated via standardized extension points"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor embedded in BIM environment capturing real-time occupancy data for adaptive lighting control and operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor within BIM capturing operational temperature data for real-time monitoring and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring real-time energy consumption metrics for building performance analysis and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

instance EnvironmentalParameterSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing environmental parameters (lighting conditions, air quality) for non-visual health effects monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalParameterDataStream
]

instance BIMEnrichedDeviceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor automatically extracted from BIM models during model-driven deployment for bidirectional communication with physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BIMDeviceMetadataStream
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalParameterDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalParameterSensor
]

instance BIMDeviceMetadataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMEnrichedDeviceSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM model incorporating static spatial attributes, functional relationships, and dynamic Building Control System metadata for runtime artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMMetadataExtractionTool
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenDeploymentPipeline
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model generated from BIM metadata for middleware configuration (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and control logic implementation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MiddlewareConfigurationTool
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicGenerator
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D interactive model rendered in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and control visualization, integrating with BIM spatial context"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineRuntime
]

instance AdaptiveLightingPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime model implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting policies for energy optimization and occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PolicyOptimizer
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for custom predictive maintenance services with anomaly detection capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnomalyDetectionEngine
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MaintenanceAlertSystem
]

instance OccupancyDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data repository storing real-time occupancy metrics for adaptive control decisions and performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance EnergyPerformanceDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data store for energy consumption metrics and optimization results from real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

instance EnvironmentalDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data repository for environmental parameters affecting non-visual health effects and adaptive lighting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalParameterDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance BIMMetadataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata extracted from BIM models for runtime configuration and device identification"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMDeviceMetadataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MiddlewareConfigurationTool
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicGenerator
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMMetadataExtractionTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool automating extraction of sensor/actuator metadata and control logic from BIM models for runtime configuration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenDeploymentPipeline
]

instance MiddlewareConfigurationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool generating middleware configurations (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) based on BIM metadata for real-time data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeConfigurationModel
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance ControlLogicGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven generator creating control logic implementations from BIM-enriched models for bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeConfigurationModel
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance UnrealEngineRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime environment for rendering interactive 3D visualization models in Unreal Engine 5 with BIM spatial integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealEngineVisualizationModel
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for adaptive lighting control policy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingPolicyModel
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance PolicyOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System for iterative policy refinement based on post-occupancy sensor data for adaptive lighting optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingPolicyModel
]

instance AnomalyDetectionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine detecting deviations from expected behavior for predictive maintenance and anomaly detection services"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceModel
]

instance MaintenanceAlertSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System generating alerts and triggering corrective actions for predictive maintenance services"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceModel
]

instance ModelDrivenDeploymentPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated pipeline transforming BIM models into runtime artifacts using MDE principles for scalable deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichedBuildingModel
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeConfigurationModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive visualization of building conditions (occupancy, energy consumption, environmental parameters) via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyPerformanceInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentalConditionInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing adaptive lighting control using reinforcement learning to balance energy efficiency, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyRefinementAction
]

instance ControlAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling automated commissioning and bidirectional communication between BIM models and physical Building Control Systems via middleware"
    DTDFVocab:provides BCSIntegrationAction
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicApplicationAction
]

instance ExtensibleServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing standardized extension points for deploying custom services (predictive maintenance, anomaly detection) without redeploying core framework"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceDeploymentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of building occupancy patterns for proactive decision-making by facility managers"
]

instance EnergyPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of energy consumption metrics enabling performance analysis and optimization recommendations"
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of environmental parameters affecting occupant health and building performance"
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting parameters based on occupancy, energy consumption, and environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PolicyRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Iterative refinement of adaptive lighting control policies using post-occupancy sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BCSIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication between BIM models and physical Building Control Systems for seamless integration"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlLogicApplicationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Application of control logic derived from BIM-enriched models to physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceDeploymentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deployment of custom services (predictive maintenance, anomaly detection) via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor,
               EnergyConsumptionSensor, EnvironmentalParameterSensor,
               OccupancyActuator, AdaptiveLightingController,
               EnergyOptimizationActuator, PredictiveMaintenanceActuator,
               BIMEnrichedBuildingModel, RuntimeConfigurationModel,
               UnrealEngineVisualizationModel, AdaptiveLightingPolicyModel
]

instance AECOLivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment,
               RealTimeMonitoringService, AdaptiveLightingService,
               ControlAutomationService, ExtensibleServiceIntegrationService,
               BIMMetadataExtractionTool, MiddlewareConfigurationTool,
               ControlLogicGenerator, UnrealEngineRuntime,
               ReinforcementLearningEngine, PolicyOptimizer,
               AnomalyDetectionEngine, MaintenanceAlertSystem,
               ModelDrivenDeploymentPipeline
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is facilitated by **control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the physical building via the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The framework leverages **BIM-enriched control logic** defined by Building Control Engineers, which is automatically transformed into runtime artifacts. These artifacts enable the DT to issue commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) to actuators in real-time, ensuring adaptive control of the physical infrastructure based on virtual model predictions or optimization algorithms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with real-time synchronization, ensuring live data streams from physical sensors are processed and reflected in the virtual model. The twinning process leverages iterative updates (e.g., BOREALIS reinforcement learning) to refine control policies over time, maintaining high fidelity between the physical and virtual representations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
  1. **Core DT Framework**: Acts as the central hub, integrating BIM models, middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), and visualization (Unreal Engine 5). It provides standardized extension points for custom services.
  2. **BIM Enrichment Layer**: Building Control Engineers model devices and control logic directly in BIM, extracting metadata for runtime configuration.
  3. **Runtime Interface Layer**: Handles real-time data exchange between physical assets and the DT, ensuring synchronization via middleware protocols.
  4. **Service Integration Layer**: Supports the deployment of custom services (e.g., adaptive lighting, predictive maintenance) by DT Engineers, enabling scalability and adaptability.
  5. **Orchestration Layer**: Manages the orchestration of DT services, ensuring seamless interaction between visualization, simulation, and control components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages of the physical building:
  1. **Design Phase**: BIM models are enriched with BCS device configurations and control logic by Building Control Engineers, enabling the initial DT setup.
  2. **Construction Phase**: The DT is validated against the physical infrastructure, ensuring alignment between virtual and physical representations during installation.
  3. **Operation Phase**: The DT operates in real-time, providing continuous monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building performance (e.g., energy efficiency, occupant comfort). The framework supports **runtime evolution** via iterative updates to control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on post-occupancy data.
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: The DT is extended or reconfigured to accommodate changes in physical infrastructure or operational requirements, leveraging standardized extension points for modular updates."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The fidelity and validity of the DT are ensured through:
  1. **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Measures the interoperability and architectural coherence between the physical and virtual models, evaluating their alignment in real-time.
  2. **Model Validation**: Cross-verification between BIM models and physical infrastructure during deployment to detect discrepancies.
  3. **Runtime Synchronization**: Continuous bidirectional data exchange via Eclipse Hono/Ditto ensures the DT accurately reflects physical conditions, mitigating semantic drift (e.g., alignment issues over time).
  4. **Uncertainty Management**: While not explicitly quantified, the framework emphasizes iterative refinement of control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on post-occupancy sensor data to improve operational validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on middleware platforms (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) for real-time data exchange, facilitating bidirectional communication between physical assets and the virtual model. The system does not specify protocols like MQTT or WebSockets explicitly, but emphasizes standardized integration frameworks for scalability and interoperability."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via a model-driven pipeline that generates runtime artifacts from BIM models. Deployment is supported by Unreal Engine for visualization and a modular architecture with standardized extension points. The framework emphasizes automation and low-overhead updates, but does not specify centralized server or cloud infrastructure explicitly."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates with external systems through standardized extension points, ensuring interoperability with BIM-based workflows and other AECO platforms. While BIM is the primary semantic backbone, the framework supports modular integration without explicit mention of IFC or COBIE standards."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to BIM as the primary standard for semantic modeling, leveraging model-driven engineering (MDE) principles for consistency. Eclipse Hono and Ditto are used for middleware integration, but no explicit mention of IFC or COBIE standards is provided in the documents."
]
